articles.title: West Coast SpaceX Falcon 9 mission launches 25 Starlink satellites - Spaceflight Now
articles.summary: SpaceX launched a Falcon 9 rocket from Space Launch Complex 4E at Vandenberg Space Force Base in California. This West Coast mission successfully launched 25 Starlink satellites.

articles.summary: Live Updates: U.S. says blockade of Iranian ports "fully implemented" as Trump weighs more talks with Iran - CBS News. CENTCOM commander Adm. Brad Cooper says a blockade of Iranian ports "has been fully implemented," as the U.S.-Iran impasse over control of the Strait of Hormuz continues amid a delicate ceasefire.

articles.title: Iran war: US will make Iran 'thrive' if it ditches nukes - DW.com
articles.summary: U.S. Vice President JD Vance stated that President Donald Trump seeks a "grand bargain" with Tehran that would allow the United States to help Iran "thrive and prosper." While Vance noted that mistrust between the two countries cannot be resolved overnight, he said that Iranian negotiators expressed a desire to make a deal.
articles.description: US President Donald Trump wants a "grand bargain" with Tehran, where the US can make Iran "thrive and prosper," according to Vice President JD Vance. DW has more.
articles.author: Kate Hairsine
articles.cleanedText: US Vice President JD Vance has said that mistrust between Iran and the United States can't be resolved overnight. But Iranian negotiators wanted to make a deal, he said on Tuesday evening. Earlier…

articles.title: Hornets-Heat: 4 takeaways as Charlotte outduels Miami in Play-In classic - NBA
articles.summary: The Charlotte Hornets defeated the Miami Heat in a Play-In Tournament game to remain alive in the postseason. LaMelo Ball and Coby White both provided key performances to help secure the victory for Charlotte.

articles.title: Trump takes aim at Pope Leo again, days after calling him 'weak on crime' - CNBC
articles.summary: President Donald Trump criticized Pope Leo XIV again, suggesting the pontiff is unaware of Iran’s repressive actions against its own people. These remarks follow previous comments from the president labeling the Pope “weak on crime.” The ongoing dispute between the White House and the Vatican involves the U.S.-Israel war against Iran.
articles.description: Trump's remarks came amid a running spat between the White House and the Vatican over the U.S.-Israel war against Iran.
articles.author: Anniek Bao

articles.title: Clavicular Hospitalized After Suspected Overdose While on Livestream - The Hollywood Reporter
articles.summary: The "looksmaxxing" influencer and online streamer known as Clavicular was hospitalized Tuesday evening following a suspected overdose. The incident reportedly occurred while Clavicular was on a livestream. According to a source for The Hollywood Reporter, the streamer is currently in stable condition.

articles.title: Stock futures are little changed as S&P 500 approaches its all-time high: Live updates - CNBC
articles.summary: U.S. stock futures were little changed early Wednesday as the S&P 500 approached its all-time high. The index ended Tuesday's session less than 1% from the record high set on Jan. 28. Futures tied to the broad market index also showed little movement following the regular session.
articles.description: The S&P 500 ended Tuesday's session less than 1% from its all-time high set on Jan. 28.
articles.author: Lisa Kailai Han

articles.summary: Pokémon Pokopia is hosting a new limited-time in-game event called Bulbasaur's Jump Rope Contest. Following a previous event featuring Hoppip, this new contest includes activities such as hopping, skipping, and jumping. The event is scheduled to begin on Sunday.

articles.title: The Porsche 911 GT3 S/C Is A Manual-Only GT3 Convertible - Motor1.com
articles.summary: The Porsche 911 GT3 S/C is a manual-only convertible featuring a naturally aspirated engine that revs to 9,000 rpm. While overall Porsche sales have declined over the last three years, 911 deliveries reached a record 51,583 units in 2025.
articles.description: The S/C is a Porsche 911 GT3 Convertible in all but the name. With a manual and a naturally aspirated engine that revs to 9,000 rpm, it's a driver's delight.

articles.summary: Asian stocks extended their rally on Wednesday, with technology shares tracking strong gains on Wall Street. The upward movement was also supported by cautious optimism regarding a potential U.S.-Iran diplomatic breakthrough.

articles.summary: On Tuesday, Omaha police fatally shot a woman who reportedly kidnapped a young boy from another woman inside a Walmart. According to police, the suspect slashed the child across the face with a knife outside the store before she was killed.

articles.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Rises for 10th Day in a Row, Oil Slips Below $100 — Live Markets - WSJ
articles.summary: Stocks rose on Tuesday, with the Nasdaq composite climbing 2% to achieve its 10th consecutive day of gains. Oil prices fell below $100 a barrel as the U.S. and Iran signaled openness to more talks. Despite a U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, the market movement suggested the situation was not a concern for investors.
